item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p04","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer does trigger the anti-spiral brake in substance: it refuses the sorting-table confirmer as the default, names the repeated downstream manual gates, and moves upstream to process/data/owner control failure.
